requirements.01_overview: High-level summary of the ContentRepurpose AI SaaS.
requirements.02_problem: Market pain or technical need addressed by this project.
requirements.03_success_criteria: Measurable metrics in SI units (seconds, bytes) AND Financial KPIs (Target CAC, Target LTV, Cost per execution).
requirements.04_user_stories: Functional narratives from the user perspective.
requirements.07_constraints: Strategic and technical limitations (e.g., No-Code, AI-Native).
requirements.08_data: Data modeling, schema, and persistence strategy.
requirements.09_ui_ux: Atomic design tokens, shadcn components, and flow definition.
requirements.10_risks: Potential technical or market blockers and mitigation plans.
requirements.11_out_of_scope: Explicit boundaries to prevent feature creep.

acceptance_criteria: Existencia física de PRP_CONTRACT.json en la raíz del proyecto.
Validación de fases M1-M5 completada mediante kanban-solidity-gate.
Métricas reportadas en Segundos (s) y Bytes (B).
